---
title: "AI for Data Analysis"
date: 27 May 2025
format: 
  beamer:
    incremental: false
---

# Data Analysis

## **What?**

-   Descriptive

-   Exploratory

-   Inferential

## Tools

-   Spreadsheets: Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets.

-   Data Visualization: Tableau, Power BI.

-   Programming Languages: Python, R.

-   Statistical Software: SAS, SPSS.

-   Big Data Processing: Apache Spark.

## AI integration

-   Automating Processes

-   Data cleaning

-   Enhancing interpretation

# Ways to use AI in Data Analysis

::: nonincremental
-   Generating code & debugging errors

-   Cleaning data

-   Explaining analysis

-   Creating reports
:::

## Hand-made

-   The comprehensive search strategy

-   The quality assessment

# Thank you - AN
